dry_run_payload.text_style_prompt: Tango human Sherman commander variant on existing M4A3 Sherman model. Preserve exact geometry and silhouette. US olive drab base, Normandy road dust and modest mud. One clear muted GREEN field-painted recognition stripe wrapping across turret and front hull, practical and military. Human lived-in crew personality through cleaner rubbed upper hull surfaces, boot scuffs around hatches, varied tan and olive canvas stowage coloration, subtle coffee-colored stains, hand-worn edges, gentle veteran maintenance. No letters. No words. No alphabet patterns. No road sign text. No lucky-symbol graphic. No decorative typography. No cartoon logo. Realistic maintained American Sherman tank paint.
